news.title:
Capri Global Capital Ltd sets up $1B GMTN programme for foreign currency debt issuance.
GMTN allows flexible funding; Capri shares closed at ₹167.5, down 0.39% on BSE.
news.summary:
Capri Global Capital Ltd sets up $1B GMTN programme for foreign currency debt issuance.
GMTN allows flexible funding; Capri shares closed at ₹167.5, down 0.39% on BSE.

news.title: Capri Global Capital files draft shelf prospectus for ₹2,000 crore NCD issuance.
news.summary: Capri Global Capital files draft shelf prospectus for ₹2,000 crore NCD issuance.

news.title:
Capri Global Capital Ltd invested Rs. 200 Cr in its subsidiary CGHFL via a Rights Issue at Rs. 274/share.
Post-allotment, Capri's stake in CGHFL rose from 7.88 Cr to 8.61 Cr shares, maintaining 100% ownership.
news.summary:
Capri Global Capital Ltd invested Rs. 200 Cr in its subsidiary CGHFL via a Rights Issue at Rs. 274/share.
Post-allotment, Capri's stake in CGHFL rose from 7.88 Cr to 8.61 Cr shares, maintaining 100% ownership.

news.title:
Moody's assigns a first-time Ba3 long-term corporate family rating to Capri Global Capital Ltd.
The rating rationale was published on March 20, 2026, and available on Capri's website.
news.summary:
Moody's assigns a first-time Ba3 long-term corporate family rating to Capri Global Capital Ltd.
The rating rationale was published on March 20, 2026, and available on Capri's website.

news.title:
Capri Global Capital Ltd's credit rating for loans and NCDs upgraded by Acuite to ACUITE AA/Stable.
Loan limits increased to Rs. 9,550 Cr and NCD limits to Rs. 2,850 Cr by Acuite.
news.summary:
Capri Global Capital Ltd's credit rating for loans and NCDs upgraded by Acuite to ACUITE AA/Stable.
Loan limits increased to Rs. 9,550 Cr and NCD limits to Rs. 2,850 Cr by Acuite.

news.title:
Capri Global Capital saw a block trade of 3,023,208 shares at Rs. 167.99.
The trade on NSE totaled Rs. 50.79 crores in value.
news.summary:
Capri Global Capital saw a block trade of 3,023,208 shares at Rs. 167.99.
The trade on NSE totaled Rs. 50.79 crores in value.

news.title:
Capri Global Capital plans a board meeting on Mar 10, 2026, to discuss ₹2,000 cr NCD issuance.
The ₹2,000 cr non-convertible debentures will be issued via a public offering.
news.summary:
Capri Global Capital plans a board meeting on Mar 10, 2026, to discuss ₹2,000 cr NCD issuance.
The ₹2,000 cr non-convertible debentures will be issued via a public offering.

news.title:
Capri Global Capital Ltd to hold group and one-on-one meetings with analysts and investors on Feb 9, 2026, in Mumbai.
Discussions will include Q3 FY2026 updates, earnings, and general business overview without sharing unpublished sensitive information.
news.summary:
Capri Global Capital Ltd to hold group and one-on-one meetings with analysts and investors on Feb 9, 2026, in Mumbai.
Discussions will include Q3 FY2026 updates, earnings, and general business overview without sharing unpublished sensitive information.

news.title:
Capri Global plans its maiden dollar bond, targeting $200-300M with Deutsche Bank, Barclays, and Citigroup involved.
Proceeds aim to expand its loan book; issuance expected in March/April pending ratings and borrowing costs.
news.summary:
Capri Global plans its maiden dollar bond, targeting $200-300M with Deutsche Bank, Barclays, and Citigroup involved.
Proceeds aim to expand its loan book; issuance expected in March/April pending ratings and borrowing costs.

news.title: Capri Global Capital's Q3 consolidated net profit rose to 2.55B INR from 1.28B INR YoY.
news.summary: Capri Global Capital's Q3 consolidated net profit rose to 2.55B INR from 1.28B INR YoY.

news.title:
Capri Global and Reliance to jointly acquire Sevenhills Hospital in Mumbai.
The agreement marks a strategic move for Capri Global and Reliance.
news.summary:
Capri Global and Reliance to jointly acquire Sevenhills Hospital in Mumbai.
The agreement marks a strategic move for Capri Global and Reliance.

news.title:
Capri Global Capital's board meeting on Jan 29, 2026, to review Q3 FY26 financials.
Board to discuss fund-raising via foreign currency bonds or debt securities under regulatory compliance.
news.summary:
Capri Global Capital's board meeting on Jan 29, 2026, to review Q3 FY26 financials.
Board to discuss fund-raising via foreign currency bonds or debt securities under regulatory compliance.

news.title:
Capri Global Capital's Co-CEO Monu Ratra resigns, raising leadership concerns.
The move sparks questions about the company's future strategic direction.
news.summary:
Capri Global Capital's Co-CEO Monu Ratra resigns, raising leadership concerns.
The move sparks questions about the company's future strategic direction.

news.title:
Capri Global Capital Ltd's board will meet on Jan 29, 2026, to review unaudited financials for Dec 31, 2025.
The financials, both standalone and consolidated, will undergo statutory auditors' limited review.
news.summary:
Capri Global Capital Ltd's board will meet on Jan 29, 2026, to review unaudited financials for Dec 31, 2025.
The financials, both standalone and consolidated, will undergo statutory auditors' limited review.

news.title:
CRISIL reaffirmed Capri Global Capital's credit rating at Crisil A1.
The Commercial Paper Programme limit was enhanced from Rs. 700 Cr to Rs. 1500 Cr.
news.summary:
CRISIL reaffirmed Capri Global Capital's credit rating at Crisil A1.
The Commercial Paper Programme limit was enhanced from Rs. 700 Cr to Rs. 1500 Cr.

news.title: Capri Global saw 4.57M shares traded in two block trades at Rs 185.
news.summary: Capri Global saw 4.57M shares traded in two block trades at Rs 185.

news.title: Capri Global targets a gold loan asset base of ₹20 crore per branch by FY27.
news.summary: Capri Global targets a gold loan asset base of ₹20 crore per branch by FY27.

news.title:
Capri Global Capital confirms principal payment for Commercial Paper due on 05.01.2026.
The redeemed amount was Rs. 10,000 lakhs with no outstanding balance reported.
news.summary:
Capri Global Capital confirms principal payment for Commercial Paper due on 05.01.2026.
The redeemed amount was Rs. 10,000 lakhs with no outstanding balance reported.

news.title:
Capri Global Capital Ltd announces group meetings with analysts and investors on Jan 8, 2026, in Mumbai.
Discussions will cover Q2 FY2026 updates, earnings, and corporate overview; no sensitive info to be shared.
news.summary:
Capri Global Capital Ltd announces group meetings with analysts and investors on Jan 8, 2026, in Mumbai.
Discussions will cover Q2 FY2026 updates, earnings, and corporate overview; no sensitive info to be shared.

news.title:
Capri Global Capital Ltd completed an early buyback of its listed Commercial Paper, redeeming 500 units worth Rs. 25 cr.
The redemption was executed on Dec 24, 2025, ahead of the maturity date of Jul 29, 2026, with no outstanding amount remaining.
news.summary:
Capri Global Capital Ltd completed an early buyback of its listed Commercial Paper, redeeming 500 units worth Rs. 25 cr.
The redemption was executed on Dec 24, 2025, ahead of the maturity date of Jul 29, 2026, with no outstanding amount remaining.
